channel.title: AI & Digital Transformation on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in AI & Digital Transformation on CEDIS

item.title: Products
item.description: The Undergraduate Analysis Model (MAGRA) enables the prediction of dropout rates in face-to-face undergraduate courses.

item.title: Products
item.description: The Academic Management Support System - SAGA is a tool developed to assist academic managers in monitoring indicators for undergraduate courses.

item.title: Products
item.description: 2025 technological product for centralizing administrative information to support student development at FCTE, using a chatbot and artificial intelligence.

item.title: Products
item.description: 2025 technological product applying machine learning to non-invasive prediction of euploidy in human embryos based on morphokinetic data.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Tcc by Maria Eduarda dos Santos Abritta Ferreira, Sabrina Caldas Berno (2025).

item.title: Publications
item.description: Tcc by Breno Henrique de Souza, Giulia Domingues de Alcantara (2025).

item.title: Artificial intelligence and data analysis for digital transformation
item.description: Ongoing umbrella project focused on applying artificial intelligence, machine learning, natural language processing, and data analysis to digital transformation initiatives.
